lines.speaker: Child
lines.text: He-he-hello?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, I wondered if I could have a chat.

lines.speaker: Child
lines.text: Well, I guess so.

lines.speaker: Child
lines.text: Argghghhh!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, don't be scared, I just want to talk to you.

lines.speaker: Child
lines.text: Well, I guess so.

lines.speaker: Child
lines.text: Leave me alone!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry but I need to ask a couple of questions.

lines.speaker: Child
lines.text: Well, I guess so.

lines.speaker: Child
lines.text: Get off me! I haven't got anything!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, calm down, I'm not going to hurt you. I just want to ask a few questions.

lines.speaker: Child
lines.text: Well, I guess so.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do here?

lines.speaker: Child
lines.text: I'm not supposed to talk to strangers, and you sure are strange...

lines.speaker: Child
lines.text: Nuffin'! I wasn't doin' nuffin'!

lines.speaker: Child
lines.text: I 'elp wiv building fings an' da wall. But mainly I is hiding from da vyresies. I don't like dem vyresies.

lines.speaker: Child
lines.text: I was playin', but den da flapsies came so I was hidin'. Don't want da flapsies to bit me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm lost, can you help me?

lines.speaker: Child
lines.text: Urm, well I fink we're in sector [one/two/three/six]. Not sure what else to say. I'm only a kid ya know!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know about the Myreque?

lines.speaker: Child
lines.text: Err, me dad says I'm not allowed to talk about that. Do you have any sweets?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, sorry, but please can you answer my questions?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: (whisper) Do you know about the Myreque?

lines.speaker: Child
lines.text: Err, no! I'm not allowed to say any thingies about dem; but they're the good 'uns what can help us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, thanks.
